Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Terms for a given signature. *)
(** Gianluca Amato,  Marco Maggesi, Cosimo Perini Brogi 2019-2022 *)
(**
This file contains a formalization of terms over a signature, implemented as a sequence of
operation symbols. This sequence is though to be executed by a stack machine: each
symbol of arity _n_ virtually pops _n_ elements from the stack and pushes a new element.
A sequence of function symbols is a term when the result of the execution is a stack
with a single element and no stack underflow or type errors occur.

Here we only define ground terms, while terms with variables will be defined in <<VTerms.v>>.
*)

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.

Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.Maybe.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Universal.SortedTypes.
Require Export UniMath.Algebra.Universal.Signatures.

Local Open Scope sorted.
Local Open Scope hvec.
Local Open Scope list.
Local Open Scope transport.

(** ** Definition of [oplist] (operations list). *)
(**
An [oplist] is a list of operation symbols, interpreted as commands to be executed by a stack
machine. Elements of the stack are sorts. When an operation symbol is executed  its arity is
popped out from the stack and replaced by its range. When a stack underflow occurs,
or when the sorts present in the stack are not the ones expected by the operator, the stack goes into an
error condition which is propagated by successive operations. A term is an [oplist] that produces
a stack of length one, when execution starts from the empty stack. Operation symbols are executed in
order from the last element of the [oplist] to the first.
*)

Local Definition oplist (σ: signature):= list (names σ).

Bind Scope list_scope with oplist.

Identity Coercion oplistislist: oplist >-> list.


σ: signature
isaset (oplist σ)


σ: signature
isaset (oplist σ)

  
σ: signature
isofhlevel 2 (names σ)

  apply setproperty.
Defined.

Local Definition stack (σ: signature): UU := maybe (list (sorts σ)).


σ: signature
isaset (stack σ)


σ: signature
isaset (stack σ)

  
σ: signature
isaset (list (sorts σ))

  
σ: signature
isofhlevel 2 (sorts σ)

  
σ: signature
isdeceq (sorts σ)

  apply decproperty.
Defined.

Section Oplists.

  Context {σ: signature}.

  (** *** The [opexec] and [oplistexec] functions. *)
  (**
     The function [opexec nm] is the stack transformation corresponding to the execution of
     the operation symbol [nm], while [oplistexec l] returns the stack corresponding to the
     execution of the entire oplist [l] starting from the empty stack. The list is executed from the last
     to the first operation symbol. Finally [isaterm l] holds when the result of [oplistexec l]
     is a stack of length one.
   *)

  Local Definition opexec (nm: names σ): stack σ → stack σ
    := flatmap (λ ss, just (sort nm :: ss)) ∘ flatmap (λ ss, prefix_remove (arity nm) ss).

  Local Definition oplistexec (l: oplist σ): stack σ := foldr opexec (just []) l.

  Local Definition isaterm (s: sorts σ) (l: oplist σ): UU := oplistexec l = just ([s]).

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
l: oplist σ
isaprop (isaterm s l)

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
l: oplist σ
isaprop (isaterm s l)

    apply isasetstack.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
(opexec nm (just ss) = nothing
 × prefix_remove (arity nm) ss = nothing)
⨿ (∑ ss' : list (sorts σ),
   opexec nm (just ss) = just (sort nm :: ss')
   × prefix_remove (arity nm) ss = just ss')

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
(opexec nm (just ss) = nothing
 × prefix_remove (arity nm) ss = nothing)
⨿ (∑ ss' : list (sorts σ),
   opexec nm (just ss) = just (sort nm :: ss')
   × prefix_remove (arity nm) ss = just ss')

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
((flatmap (λ ss : list (sorts σ), inl (sort nm :: ss))
  ∘ flatmap
      (λ ss : list (sorts σ),
       prefix_remove (arity nm) ss)) (inl ss) =
 nothing × prefix_remove (arity nm) ss = nothing)
⨿ (∑ ss' : list (sorts σ),
   (flatmap
      (λ ss : list (sorts σ), inl (sort nm :: ss))
    ∘ flatmap
        (λ ss : list (sorts σ),
         prefix_remove (arity nm) ss)) (inl ss) =
   inl (sort nm :: ss')
   × prefix_remove (arity nm) ss = inl ss')

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
(flatmap (λ ss : list (sorts σ), inl (sort nm :: ss))
   (prefix_remove (arity nm) ss) = nothing
 × prefix_remove (arity nm) ss = nothing)
⨿ (∑ ss' : list (sorts σ),
   flatmap
     (λ ss : list (sorts σ), inl (sort nm :: ss))
     (prefix_remove (arity nm) ss) =
   inl (sort nm :: ss')
   × prefix_remove (arity nm) ss = inl ss')

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss, ss': list (sorts σ)
(flatmap (λ ss : list (sorts σ), inl (sort nm :: ss))
   (inl ss') = nothing × inl ss' = nothing)
⨿ (∑ ss'0 : list (sorts σ),
   flatmap
     (λ ss : list (sorts σ), inl (sort nm :: ss))
     (inl ss') = inl (sort nm :: ss'0)
   × inl ss' = inl ss'0)
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
error: unit
(flatmap (λ ss : list (sorts σ), inl (sort nm :: ss))
   (inr error) = nothing × inr error = nothing)
⨿ (∑ ss' : list (sorts σ),
   flatmap
     (λ ss : list (sorts σ), inl (sort nm :: ss))
     (inr error) = inl (sort nm :: ss')
   × inr error = inl ss')

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss, ss': list (sorts σ)
(flatmap (λ ss : list (sorts σ), inl (sort nm :: ss))
   (inl ss') = nothing × inl ss' = nothing)
⨿ (∑ ss'0 : list (sorts σ),
   flatmap
     (λ ss : list (sorts σ), inl (sort nm :: ss))
     (inl ss') = inl (sort nm :: ss'0)
   × inl ss' = inl ss'0)

ss, ss': list (sorts σ)
flatmap (λ ss : list (sorts σ), inl (sort nm :: ss))
  (inl ss') = inl (sort nm :: ss') × inl ss' = inl ss'

      split; apply idpath.

  ss = sort nm :: ss' × st = just (arity nm ++ ss')

σ: signature
oplistexec ([] : oplist σ) = just []

    apply idpath.
  Defined.

σ: signature
oplistexec [] = just [] → [] = []
σ: signature
∏ (x : names σ) (xs : list (names σ)),
(oplistexec xs = just [] → xs = [])
→ oplistexec (x :: xs) = just [] → x :: xs = []

    
σ: signature
oplistexec [] = just [] → [] = []
 reflexivity.

(oplistexec xs = just [] → xs = [])
→ oplistexec (x :: xs) = just [] → x :: xs = []

s: sorts σ

→ ∑ (x : names σ) (xs : oplist σ), l = x :: xs

σ: signature
s: sorts σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
∏ (x : names σ) (xs : list (names σ)),
(oplistexec xs = just (s :: ss)
 → ∑ (x0 : names σ) (xs0 : oplist σ), xs = x0 :: xs0)
→ oplistexec (x :: xs) = just (s :: ss)
  → ∑ (x0 : names σ) (xs0 : oplist σ),
    x :: xs = x0 :: xs0

σ: signature
s: sorts σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
∏ (x : names σ) (xs : list (names σ)),
(oplistexec xs = just (s :: ss)
 → ∑ (x0 : names σ) (xs0 : oplist σ), xs = x0 :: xs0)
→ oplistexec (x :: xs) = just (s :: ss)
  → ∑ (x0 : names σ) (xs0 : oplist σ),
    x :: xs = x0 :: xs0
 
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
x: names σ
xs: list (names σ)
lstack: oplistexec (x :: xs) = just (s :: ss)
∑ (x0 : names σ) (xs0 : oplist σ), x :: xs = x0 :: xs0

      
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
x: names σ
xs: list (names σ)
lstack: oplistexec (x :: xs) = just (s :: ss)
∑ xs0 : oplist σ, x :: xs = x :: xs0

      
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
x: names σ
xs: list (names σ)
lstack: oplistexec (x :: xs) = just (s :: ss)
x :: xs = x :: xs

      apply idpath.
  Defined.

  (** *** The [stackconcatenate] function. *)

  (**
  [stackconcatenate] simply appends the two lists which make the stacks, possibly propagating
  erroneous states.
  *)

  Local Definition stackconcatenate (st1 st2: stack σ): stack σ
    := flatmap (λ st2', flatmap (λ st1', just (st1' ++ st2')) st1) st2.

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
st1, st2: stack σ
opexec nm st1 != nothing
→ stackconcatenate (opexec nm st1) st2 =
  opexec nm (stackconcatenate st1 st2)

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
st1, st2: stack σ
opexec nm st1 != nothing
→ stackconcatenate (opexec nm st1) st2 =
  opexec nm (stackconcatenate st1 st2)

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1: list (sorts σ)
st2: stack σ
opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
→ stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inl ss1)) st2 =
  opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) st2)
σ: signature
nm: names σ
b: unit
st2: stack σ
opexec nm (inr b) != nothing
→ stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inr b)) st2 =
  opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inr b) st2)

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1: list (sorts σ)
st2: stack σ
opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
→ stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inl ss1)) st2 =
  opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) st2)

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
→ stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inl ss1)) (inl ss2) =
  opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) (inl ss2))
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1: list (sorts σ)
b: unit
opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
→ stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inl ss1)) (inr b) =
  opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) (inr b))

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
→ stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inl ss1)) (inl ss2) =
  opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) (inl ss2))

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inl ss1)) (inl ss2) =
opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) (inl ss2))

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
Xerr: opexec nm (just ss1) = nothing
× prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = nothing
stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inl ss1)) (inl ss2) =
opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) (inl ss2))
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
Xok: ∑ ss' : list (sorts σ),
opexec nm (just ss1) = just (sort nm :: ss')
× prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just ss'
stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inl ss1)) (inl ss2) =
opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) (inl ss2))

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
Xerr: opexec nm (just ss1) = nothing
× prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = nothing
stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inl ss1)) (inl ss2) =
opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) (inl ss2))
 contradicts H (pr1 Xerr).
    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
Xok: ∑ ss' : list (sorts σ),
opexec nm (just ss1) = just (sort nm :: ss')
× prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just ss'
stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inl ss1)) (inl ss2) =
opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) (inl ss2))
 
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
tl: list (sorts σ)
scons: opexec nm (just ss1) = just (sort nm :: tl)
pref: prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just tl
stackconcatenate (opexec nm (inl ss1)) (inl ss2) =
opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) (inl ss2))

      
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
tl: list (sorts σ)
scons: opexec nm (inl ss1) = inl (sort nm :: tl)

opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) (inl ss2))

      
σ: signature

ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing

scons: opexec nm (inl ss1) = inl (sort nm :: tl)
pref: prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just tl
stackconcatenate (inl (sort nm :: tl)) (inl ss2) =
opexec nm (stackconcatenate (inl ss1) (inl ss2))

      
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
tl: list (sorts σ)
scons: opexec nm (inl ss1) = inl (sort nm :: tl)
pref: prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just tl
just ((sort nm :: tl) ++ ss2) =
opexec nm (just (ss1 ++ ss2))

      
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
tl: list (sorts σ)
scons: opexec nm (inl ss1) = inl (sort nm :: tl)
pref: prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just tl
just (sort nm :: tl ++ ss2) =

σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
tl: list (sorts σ)
scons: opexec nm (inl ss1) = inl (sort nm :: tl)
pref: prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just tl
just (sort nm :: tl ++ ss2) =
(flatmap (λ ss : list (sorts σ), just (sort nm :: ss))
 ∘ flatmap
     (λ ss : list (sorts σ),
      prefix_remove (arity nm) ss))
  (just (ss1 ++ ss2))

      
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
tl: list (sorts σ)
scons: opexec nm (inl ss1) = inl (sort nm :: tl)
pref: prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just tl
just (sort nm :: tl ++ ss2) =
flatmap (λ ss : list (sorts σ), just (sort nm :: ss))
  (prefix_remove (arity nm) (ss1 ++ ss2))

      
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
tl: list (sorts σ)
scons: opexec nm (inl ss1) = inl (sort nm :: tl)
pref: prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just tl
just (sort nm :: tl ++ ss2) =
flatmap (λ ss : list (sorts σ), just (sort nm :: ss))
  (inl (?tl ++ ss2))
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
tl: list (sorts σ)
scons: opexec nm (inl ss1) = inl (sort nm :: tl)
pref: prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just tl
prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = inl ?tl

      
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
tl: list (sorts σ)
scons: opexec nm (inl ss1) = inl (sort nm :: tl)
pref: prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just tl
just (sort nm :: tl ++ ss2) =
flatmap (λ ss : list (sorts σ), just (sort nm :: ss))
  (inl (?tl ++ ss2))
 apply idpath.
      
σ: signature
nm: names σ
ss1, ss2: list (sorts σ)
H: opexec nm (inl ss1) != nothing
tl: list (sorts σ)
scons: opexec nm (inl ss1) = inl (sort nm :: tl)
pref: prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = just tl
prefix_remove (arity nm) ss1 = inl tl
 assumption.
  Defined.

 
σ: signature
l1, l2: oplist σ
oplistexec l1 != nothing
→ oplistexec (l1 ++ l2) =
  stackconcatenate (oplistexec l1) (oplistexec l2)

  
σ: signature
l1, l2: oplist σ
oplistexec l1 != nothing
→ oplistexec (l1 ++ l2) =
  stackconcatenate (oplistexec l1) (oplistexec l2)

    
σ: signature
l2: oplist σ
∏ l1 : oplist σ,
oplistexec l1 != nothing
→ oplistexec (l1 ++ l2) =
  stackconcatenate (oplistexec l1) (oplistexec l2)

    
σ: signature
l2: oplist σ
oplistexec [] != nothing
→ oplistexec ([] ++ l2) =
  stackconcatenate (oplistexec []) (oplistexec l2)
σ: signature
l2: oplist σ
∏ (x : names σ) (xs : list (names σ)),
(oplistexec xs != nothing
 → oplistexec (xs ++ l2) =
   stackconcatenate (oplistexec xs) (oplistexec l2))
→ oplistexec (x :: xs) != nothing
  → oplistexec ((x :: xs) ++ l2) =
    stackconcatenate (oplistexec (x :: xs))
      (oplistexec l2)

→ oplistexec ([] ++ l2) =

(oplistexec xs != nothing
 → oplistexec (xs ++ l2) =

→ oplistexec (x :: xs) != nothing
  → oplistexec ((x :: xs) ++ l2) =

      (oplistexec l2)

  (oplistexec l2)

∅

        
σ: signature
l2: oplist σ
x: names σ
xs: list (names σ)
IHxs: oplistexec xs != nothing
→ oplistexec (xs ++ l2) =
  stackconcatenate (oplistexec xs)
    (oplistexec l2)
noerror: opexec x nothing != nothing
error: oplistexec xs = nothing
∅

        contradiction.
  Defined.

  (** *** The [oplistsplit] function. *)

  (**
     [oplistsplit] splits an oplist into an oplist of up to [n] terms and an oplist of the remaining
     terms.
   *)

  
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
n: nat
oplist σ × oplist σ

  
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
n: nat
oplist σ × oplist σ

oplist σ → nat → oplist σ × oplist σ

nat → oplist σ × oplist σ

names σ
→ list (names σ)
  → (nat → oplist σ × oplist σ)
    → nat → oplist σ × oplist σ

nat → oplist σ × oplist σ
 
σ: signature
n: nat
oplist σ × oplist σ

      exact (nil ,, nil).

names σ
→ list (names σ)
  → (nat → oplist σ × oplist σ)
    → nat → oplist σ × oplist σ

 exact (nil,, (x :: xs)).

oplist σ × oplist σ

        exact ((x :: IHfirst) ,, IHsecond).
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
oplistsplit l 0 = [],, l

  
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
oplistsplit l 0 = [],, l

    
σ: signature
∏ l : oplist σ, oplistsplit l 0 = [],, l

    refine (list_ind _ _ _) ; reflexivity.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
n: nat
oplistsplit [] n = [],, []

  
σ: signature
n: nat
oplistsplit [] n = [],, []

    apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
x: names σ
xs: oplist σ
n: nat
oplistsplit (x :: xs) (S n) =
(x :: pr1 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))),,
pr2 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))

  
σ: signature
x: names σ
xs: oplist σ
n: nat
oplistsplit (x :: xs) (S n) =
(x :: pr1 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))),,
pr2 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))

    apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
l1, l2: oplist σ
n: nat
ss: list (sorts σ)
oplistexec l1 = just ss
→ n ≤ length ss
  → oplistsplit (l1 ++ l2) n =
    make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit l1 n))
      (pr2 (oplistsplit l1 n) ++ l2)

  
σ: signature

→ n ≤ length ss
  → oplistsplit (l1 ++ l2) n =
    make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit l1 n))
      (pr2 (oplistsplit l1 n) ++ l2)

∏ (l1 : oplist σ) (ss : list (sorts σ)) (n : nat),
oplistexec l1 = just ss
→ n ≤ length ss
  → oplistsplit (l1 ++ l2) n =
    make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit l1 n))
      (pr2 (oplistsplit l1 n) ++ l2)

∏ (ss : list (sorts σ)) (n : nat),
oplistexec [] = just ss
→ n ≤ length ss
  → oplistsplit ([] ++ l2) n =

      (pr2 (oplistsplit [] n) ++ l2)

∏ (x : names σ) (xs : list (names σ)),
(∏ (ss : list (sorts σ)) (n : nat),
 oplistexec xs = just ss
 → n ≤ length ss
   → oplistsplit (xs ++ l2) n =
     make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit xs n))
       (pr2 (oplistsplit xs n) ++ l2))
→ ∏ (ss : list (sorts σ)) (n : nat),
  oplistexec (x :: xs) = just ss
  → n ≤ length ss
    → oplistsplit ((x :: xs) ++ l2) n =
      make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n))
        (pr2 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n) ++ l2)

n: nat
sstail: list (sorts σ)
ssdef: ss = sort x1 :: sstail
xs1stack: oplistexec xs1 = just (arity x1 ++ sstail)
nlehss: S n ≤ length ss
IHn: n ≤ length ss
→ oplistsplit (x1 :: xs1 ++ l2) n =
  make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit (x1 :: xs1) n))
    (pr2 (oplistsplit (x1 :: xs1) n) ++ l2)
n ≤ length sstail

     
σ: signature
l2: oplist σ
x1: names σ
xs1: list (names σ)
IHxs1: ∏ (ss : list (sorts σ)) 
(n : nat),
oplistexec xs1 = just ss
→ n ≤ length ss
  → oplistsplit (xs1 ++ l2) n =
    make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit xs1 n))
      (pr2 (oplistsplit xs1 n) ++ l2)
ss: list (sorts σ)
n: nat
sstail: list (sorts σ)
ssdef: ss = sort x1 :: sstail
xs1stack: oplistexec xs1 = just (arity x1 ++ sstail)
nlehss: S n ≤ length (sort x1 :: sstail)
IHn: n ≤ length ss
→ oplistsplit (x1 :: xs1 ++ l2) n =
  make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit (x1 :: xs1) n))
    (pr2 (oplistsplit (x1 :: xs1) n) ++ l2)
n ≤ length sstail

     assumption.
  Defined.

n: nat
pr1 (oplistsplit l n) ++ pr2 (oplistsplit l n) = l

σ: signature
∏ n : nat,
pr1 (oplistsplit [] n) ++ pr2 (oplistsplit [] n) = []
σ: signature
∏ (x : names σ) (xs : list (names σ)),
(∏ n : nat,
 pr1 (oplistsplit xs n) ++ pr2 (oplistsplit xs n) = xs)
→ ∏ n : nat,
  pr1 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n) ++
  pr2 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n) = x :: xs

    
σ: signature
∏ n : nat,
pr1 (oplistsplit [] n) ++ pr2 (oplistsplit [] n) = []
 reflexivity.

∏ (x : names σ) (xs : list (names σ)),
(∏ n : nat,

→ ∏ n : nat,
  pr1 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n) ++
  pr2 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n) = x :: xs

pr2 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n) = 
x :: xs

  ((x :: pr1 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))),,
   pr2 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))) ++
pr2
  ((x :: pr1 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))),,
   pr2 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))) =
x :: xs

  Defined.

  
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
n: nat
oplistexec l = just ss
→ n ≤ length ss
  → ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
    ss = t1 ++ t2
    × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l n)) = just t1
      × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit l n)) = just t2
        × length t1 = n

  
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
n: nat
oplistexec l = just ss
→ n ≤ length ss
  → ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
    ss = t1 ++ t2
    × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l n)) = just t1
      × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit l n)) = just t2
        × length t1 = n

    
σ: signature
∏ (l : oplist σ) (ss : list (sorts σ)) (n : nat),
oplistexec l = just ss
→ n ≤ length ss
  → ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
    ss = t1 ++ t2
    × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l n)) = just t1
      × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit l n)) = just t2
        × length t1 = n

    
σ: signature
∏ (ss : list (sorts σ)) (n : nat),
oplistexec [] = just ss
→ n ≤ length ss
  → ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
    ss = t1 ++ t2
    × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit [] n)) = just t1
      × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit [] n)) = just t2
        × length t1 = n
σ: signature
∏ (x : names σ) (xs : list (names σ)),
(∏ (ss : list (sorts σ)) (n : nat),
 oplistexec xs = just ss
 → n ≤ length ss
   → ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
     ss = t1 ++ t2
     × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit xs n)) = just t1
       × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit xs n)) = just t2
         × length t1 = n)
→ ∏ (ss : list (sorts σ)) (n : nat),
  oplistexec (x :: xs) = just ss
  → n ≤ length ss
    → ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
      ss = t1 ++ t2
      × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n)) =
        just t1
        × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n)) =
          just t2 × length t1 = n

    
σ: signature
∏ (ss : list (sorts σ)) (n : nat),
oplistexec [] = just ss
→ n ≤ length ss
  → ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
    ss = t1 ++ t2
    × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit [] n)) = just t1
      × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit [] n)) = just t2
        × length t1 = n

ss: nat
nilstack: oplistexec [] = just m
nlehss: ss ≤ length m

m = t1 ++ t2
× oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit [] ss)) = just t1
  × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit [] ss)) = just t2
    × length t1 = ss

m = t1 ++ t2
× just [] = just t1
  × just [] = just t2 × length t1 = ss

× just [] = just []

σ: signature
∏ (x : names σ) (xs : list (names σ)),
(∏ (ss : list (sorts σ)) (n : nat),
 oplistexec xs = just ss
 → n ≤ length ss
   → ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
     ss = t1 ++ t2
     × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit xs n)) = just t1
       × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit xs n)) = just t2
         × length t1 = n)
→ ∏ (ss : list (sorts σ)) (n : nat),
  oplistexec (x :: xs) = just ss
  → n ≤ length ss
    → ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
      ss = t1 ++ t2
      × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n)) =
        just t1
        × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n)) =
          just t2 × length t1 = n

lstack: oplistexec (x :: xs) = just ss

→ ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
  ss = t1 ++ t2

∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
ss = t1 ++ t2
× oplistexec
    (pr1
       ((x
         :: pr1
              (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))),,
        pr2 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n)))) =
  just t1
  × oplistexec
      (pr2
         ((x
           :: pr1
                (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))),,
          pr2 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n)))) =
    just t2 × length t1 = S n

x: names σ

    ss = t1 ++ t2
    × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit xs n)) =

        just t2 × length t1 = n
ss: list (sorts σ)
n: nat
sstail: list (sorts σ)
ssdef: ss = sort x :: sstail
xsstack: oplistexec xs = just (arity x ++ sstail)

→ ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
  ss = t1 ++ t2
  × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n)) =
    just t1
    × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n)) =
      just t2 × length t1 = n

ssdef: ss = sort x :: sstail
xsstack: oplistexec xs = just (arity x ++ sstail)
nlehss: S n ≤ length ss
IHn: n ≤ length ss
→ ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
  ss = t1 ++ t2
  × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n)) =
    just t1
    × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n)) =
      just t2 × length t1 = n
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2concat: arity x ++ sstail = t1 ++ t2
t1def: oplistexec
  (pr1 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))) =
just t1
t2def: oplistexec
  (pr2 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))) =
just t2
t1len: length t1 = length (arity x) + n
ss =
sort x
:: MoreLists.drop (arity x) (length (arity x)) ++
   sstail

(flatmap (λ ss : list (sorts σ), just (sort x :: ss))
 ∘ flatmap
     (λ ss : list (sorts σ),
      prefix_remove (arity x) ss)) (just t1) =

σ: signature
x: names σ

ss: list (sorts σ)
n: nat
sstail: list (sorts σ)
ssdef: ss = sort x :: sstail
xsstack: oplistexec xs = just (arity x ++ sstail)
nlehss: S n ≤ length ss
IHn: n ≤ length ss
→ ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
  ss = t1 ++ t2
  × oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n)) =

t2def: oplistexec
  (pr2 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))) =

H: prefix_remove (arity x) (t1 ++ t2) = nothing
∅

just t2

H: prefix_remove (arity x) t1 = nothing
length (arity x) ≤ length t1

x: names σ
xs: list (names σ)

      × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit xs n)) =
        just t2 × length t1 = n

    × oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit (x :: xs) n)) =

  (pr2 (oplistsplit xs (length (arity x) + n))) =
just t2

H: prefix_remove (arity x) (t1 ++ t2) = nothing

  (length ss) lstack (isreflnatleh (length ss)): ∑ t1 t2 : list (sorts σ),
ss = t1 ++ t2
× oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
  just t1

    just t2 × length t1 = length ss

t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization:= concatenate_oplistsplit l (length ss): pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) ++
pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = l
oplistsplit l (length ss) = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: length t2 + length ss = length ss
t1def: oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t1
t2def: oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t2
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization:= concatenate_oplistsplit l (length ss): pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) ++
pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = l
oplistsplit l (length ss) = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: length t2 + length ss - length ss =
length ss - length ss
t1def: oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t1
t2def: oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t2
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization:= concatenate_oplistsplit l (length ss): pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) ++
pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = l
oplistsplit l (length ss) = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: length t2 = length ss - length ss
t1def: oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t1
t2def: oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t2
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization:= concatenate_oplistsplit l (length ss): pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) ++
pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = l
oplistsplit l (length ss) = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: length t2 = 0
t1def: oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t1
t2def: oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t2
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization:= concatenate_oplistsplit l (length ss): pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) ++
pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = l
oplistsplit l (length ss) = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: t2 = []
t1def: oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t1
t2def: oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t2
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization:= concatenate_oplistsplit l (length ss): pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) ++
pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = l
oplistsplit l (length ss) = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: t2 = []
t1def: oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t1
t2def: oplistexec (pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just []
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization:= concatenate_oplistsplit l (length ss): pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) ++
pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = l
oplistsplit l (length ss) = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: t2 = []
t1def: oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t1
t2def: pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = []
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization:= concatenate_oplistsplit l (length ss): pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) ++
pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = l
oplistsplit l (length ss) = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: t2 = []
t1def: oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t1
t2def: pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = []
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization: pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) ++ [] =
l
oplistsplit l (length ss) = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: t2 = []
t1def: oplistexec (pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss))) =
just t1
t2def: pr2 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = []
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization: pr1 (oplistsplit l (length ss)) = l
oplistsplit l (length ss) = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: t2 = []
l1, l2: oplist σ
t1def: oplistexec (pr1 (l1,, l2)) = just t1
t2def: pr2 (l1,, l2) = []
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization: pr1 (l1,, l2) = l
l1,, l2 = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: t2 = []
l1, l2: oplist σ
t1def: oplistexec l1 = just t1
t2def: l2 = []
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization: l1 = l
l1,, l2 = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: t2 = []
l1, l2: oplist σ
t1def: oplistexec l1 = just t1
t2def: l2 = []
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization: l1 = l
l1,, [] = l,, []

    
σ: signature
l: oplist σ
ss: list (sorts σ)
lstack: oplistexec l = just ss
t1, t2: list (sorts σ)
t1t2: t2 = []
l1, l2: oplist σ
t1def: oplistexec l1 = just t1
t2def: l2 = []
t1len: length t1 = length ss
normalization: l1 = l
l,, [] = l,, []

    apply idpath.
  Defined.

End Oplists.

Section Term.

  (** ** Terms and related constructors and destructors. *)

  (**  A [term] is an oplist together with the proof it is a term. *)

  Local Definition term (σ: signature) (s: sorts σ): UU
    := ∑ t: oplist σ, isaterm s t.

  Definition make_term {σ: signature} {s: sorts σ} {l: oplist σ} (lstack: isaterm s l)
    : term σ s := l ,, lstack.

  Coercion term2oplist {σ: signature} {s: sorts σ}: term σ s → oplist σ := pr1.

  Definition term2proof {σ: signature} {s: sorts σ}: ∏ t: term σ s, isaterm s t := pr2.

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
isaset (term σ s)

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
isaset (term σ s)

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
isaset (oplist σ)
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
∏ x : oplist σ, isaset (isaterm s x)

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
isaset (oplist σ)
 apply isasetoplist.
    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
∏ x : oplist σ, isaset (isaterm s x)
 
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
x: oplist σ
isaset (isaterm s x)

      
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
x: oplist σ
isaprop (isaterm s x)

      apply isasetstack.
  Defined.

  Local Definition termset (σ: signature) (s: sorts σ): hSet
    := make_hSet (term σ s) (isasetterm s).

  Context {σ: signature}.

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t1, t2: term σ s
p: t1 = t2
t1 = t2

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t1, t2: term σ s
p: t1 = t2
t1 = t2

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t1, t2: term σ s
p: t1 = t2
pr1 t1 = pr1 t2
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t1, t2: term σ s
p: t1 = t2
isaprop (isaterm s (pr1 t2))

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t1, t2: term σ s
p: t1 = t2
pr1 t1 = pr1 t2

    assumption.
  Defined.

  (** *** The [vecoplist2oplist] and [oplist2vecoplist] functions *)
  (**
  These functions transform a vec of [n] oplists into an oplists of stack [n]
  ([vecoplist2oplist]) and viceversa ([oplist2vecoplist]).
  *)

  Local Definition vecoplist2oplist {n: nat} (v: vec (oplist σ) n): oplist σ
    := vec_foldr concatenate nil v.

  
σ: signature
n: nat
x: oplist σ
v: vec (oplist σ) n
vecoplist2oplist (x ::: v) = x ++ vecoplist2oplist v

  
σ: signature
n: nat
x: oplist σ
v: vec (oplist σ) n
vecoplist2oplist (x ::: v) = x ++ vecoplist2oplist v

    apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
n: nat
ar: vec (sorts σ) n
v1, v2: hvec (vec_map (term σ) ar)
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2

  
σ: signature
n: nat
ar: vec (sorts σ) n
v1, v2: hvec (vec_map (term σ) ar)
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
∏ (n : nat) (ar : vec (sorts σ) n)
(v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) ar)),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) [()]),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
σ: signature
∏ (x : sorts σ) (n : nat) (v : vec (sorts σ) n),
(∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) v),
 vecoplist2oplist
   (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
 vecoplist2oplist
   (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
 → v1 = v2)
→ ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: v)),
  vecoplist2oplist
    (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
  vecoplist2oplist
    (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
  → v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) [()]),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
 
σ: signature
v1, v2: hvec (vec_map (term σ) [()])
X: vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
v1 = v2

      
σ: signature
v2: hvec (vec_map (term σ) [()])
X: vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) tt) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
tt = v2

      
σ: signature
X: vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) tt) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) tt)
tt = tt

      apply idpath.
    
σ: signature
∏ (x : sorts σ) (n : nat) (v : vec (sorts σ) n),
(∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) v),
 vecoplist2oplist
   (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
 vecoplist2oplist
   (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
 → v1 = v2)
→ ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: v)),
  vecoplist2oplist
    (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
  vecoplist2oplist
    (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
  → v1 = v2
 
σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
v1, v2: hvec (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
eq: vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
v1 = v2

      
σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
v1x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v1xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
v2: hvec (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
eq: vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist)
     (v1x,, v1xs)) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
v1x,, v1xs = v2

      
σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
v1x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v1xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
v2x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v2xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
eq: vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist)
     (v1x,, v1xs)) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist)
     (v2x,, v2xs))
v1x,, v1xs = v2x,, v2xs

      
σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
v1x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v1xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
v2x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v2xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
eq: v1x ++
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1lower
     (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1xs)) =
v2x ++
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1lower
     (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2xs))
v1x,, v1xs = v2x,, v2xs

      
σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
v1x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v1xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
v2x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v2xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
eq: oplistsplit
  (v1x ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1xs)))
  1 =
oplistsplit
  (v2x ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2xs)))
  1
v1x,, v1xs = v2x,, v2xs

      
σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
v1x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v1xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
v2x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v2xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
eq: make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit v1x 1))
  (pr2 (oplistsplit v1x 1) ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1xs))) =
oplistsplit
  (v2x ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2xs)))
  1
v1x,, v1xs = v2x,, v2xs

      
σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
v1x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v1xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
v2x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v2xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
eq: make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit v1x 1))
  (pr2 (oplistsplit v1x 1) ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1xs))) =
make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit v2x 1))
  (pr2 (oplistsplit v2x 1) ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2xs)))
v1x,, v1xs = v2x,, v2xs

      
σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
v1x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v1xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
v2x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v2xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
eq: make_dirprod
  (pr1 (oplistsplit v1x (length [hd (x ::: xs)])))
  (pr2 (oplistsplit v1x (length [hd (x ::: xs)])) ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1xs))) =
make_dirprod (pr1 (oplistsplit v2x 1))
  (pr2 (oplistsplit v2x 1) ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2xs)))
v1x,, v1xs = v2x,, v2xs

      
σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
v1x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v1xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
v2x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v2xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
eq: make_dirprod
  (pr1 (oplistsplit v1x (length [hd (x ::: xs)])))
  (pr2 (oplistsplit v1x (length [hd (x ::: xs)])) ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1xs))) =
make_dirprod
  (pr1 (oplistsplit v2x (length [hd (x ::: xs)])))
  (pr2 (oplistsplit v2x (length [hd (x ::: xs)])) ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2xs)))
v1x,, v1xs = v2x,, v2xs

      
σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
v1x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v1xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
v2x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v2xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
eq: make_dirprod (pr1 (v1x,, []))
  (pr2 (v1x,, []) ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1xs))) =
make_dirprod
  (pr1 (oplistsplit v2x (length [hd (x ::: xs)])))
  (pr2 (oplistsplit v2x (length [hd (x ::: xs)])) ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2xs)))
v1x,, v1xs = v2x,, v2xs

      
σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v1 v2 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2
v1x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v1xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
v2x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))
v2xs: hvec (pr2 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs)))
eq: make_dirprod (pr1 (v1x,, []))
  (pr2 (v1x,, []) ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1xs))) =
make_dirprod (pr1 (v2x,, []))
  (pr2 (v2x,, []) ++
   vecoplist2oplist
     (h1lower
        (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2xs)))
v1x,, v1xs = v2x,, v2xs

vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
→ v1 = v2

v2x: pr1 (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: xs))

v: hvec (vec_map (term σ) ar)

σ: signature
∏ (x : sorts σ) (n : nat) (v : vec (sorts σ) n),
(∏ v0 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) v),
 oplistexec
   (vecoplist2oplist
      (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v0)) =
 just (n,, v))
→ ∏ v0 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: v)),
  oplistexec
    (vecoplist2oplist
       (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v0)) =
  just (S n,, (x ::: v)%vec)

x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n

  (vecoplist2oplist

  (vx ++

σ: signature
x: sorts σ
n: nat
xs: vec (sorts σ) n
IHxs: ∏ v : hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs),

vxs: hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs)
stackconcatenate (oplistexec vx)
  (oplistexec
     (vecoplist2oplist
        (h1lower
           (h1map (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) vxs)))) =
just (S n,, (x ::: xs)%vec)

        apply negpathsii1ii2.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
n: nat
ar: vec (sorts σ) n
l: oplist σ
lstack: oplistexec l = just (n,, ar)
∑ v : hvec (vec_map (term σ) ar),
hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ)
      (t : (λ H : sorts σ, term σ H) a),
      length t ≤ length l) v)
× vecoplist2oplist
    (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) = l

  
σ: signature
n: nat
ar: vec (sorts σ) n
l: oplist σ
lstack: oplistexec l = just (n,, ar)
∑ v : hvec (vec_map (term σ) ar),
hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ)
      (t : (λ H : sorts σ, term σ H) a),
      length t ≤ length l) v)
× vecoplist2oplist
    (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) = l

    
σ: signature
∏ (n : nat) (ar : vec (sorts σ) n) (l : oplist σ),
oplistexec l = just (n,, ar)
→ ∑ v : hvec (vec_map (term σ) ar),
  hvec
    (h1map_vec
       (λ (a : sorts σ)
        (t : (λ H : sorts σ, term σ H) a),
        length t ≤ length l) v)
  × vecoplist2oplist
      (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) = l

    
σ: signature
∏ l : oplist σ,
oplistexec l = just (0,, [()]%vec)
→ ∑ v : hvec (vec_map (term σ) [()]),
  hvec
    (h1map_vec
       (λ (a : sorts σ) (t : term σ a),
        length t ≤ length l) v)
  × vecoplist2oplist
      (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) = l
σ: signature
∏ (x : sorts σ) (n : nat) (v : vec (sorts σ) n),
(∏ l : oplist σ,
 oplistexec l = just (n,, v)
 → ∑ v0 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) v),
   hvec
     (h1map_vec
        (λ (a : sorts σ) (t : term σ a),
         length t ≤ length l) v0)
   × vecoplist2oplist
       (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v0) = l)
→ ∏ l : oplist σ,
  oplistexec l = just (S n,, (x ::: v)%vec)
  → ∑ v0 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: v)),
    hvec
      (h1map_vec
         (λ (a : sorts σ) (t : term σ a),
          length t ≤ length l) v0)
    × vecoplist2oplist
        (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v0) =
      l

    
σ: signature
∏ l : oplist σ,
oplistexec l = just (0,, [()]%vec)
→ ∑ v : hvec (vec_map (term σ) [()]),
  hvec
    (h1map_vec
       (λ (a : sorts σ) (t : term σ a),
        length t ≤ length l) v)
  × vecoplist2oplist
      (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) = l

lstack: oplistexec l = just (0,, [()]%vec)

hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t : term σ a),
      length t ≤ length l) v)
× vecoplist2oplist
    (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) = l

hvec
  (h1map_vec

      length t ≤ length l) [()])
× vecoplist2oplist
    (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) [()]) = l

σ: signature
∏ (x : sorts σ) (n : nat) (v : vec (sorts σ) n),
(∏ l : oplist σ,
 oplistexec l = just (n,, v)
 → ∑ v0 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) v),
   hvec
     (h1map_vec
        (λ (a : sorts σ) (t : term σ a),
         length t ≤ length l) v0)
   × vecoplist2oplist
       (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v0) = l)
→ ∏ l : oplist σ,
  oplistexec l = just (S n,, (x ::: v)%vec)
  → ∑ v0 : hvec (vec_map (term σ) (x ::: v)),
    hvec
      (h1map_vec
         (λ (a : sorts σ) (t : term σ a),
          length t ≤ length l) v0)
    × vecoplist2oplist
        (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v0) =
      l

concstack: reststack = reststack
first:= pr1 (oplistsplit l 1): oplist σ
firststackp: oplistexec first = just [a]
rest:= pr2 (oplistsplit l 1): (λ _ : oplist σ, oplist σ)
  (pr1 (oplistsplit l 1))
reststackp: oplistexec rest = just reststack
concstack': a = a
v: hvec (vec_map (term σ) xs)
vlen: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t : term σ a), 
      length t ≤ length rest) v)
vflatten: vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) =
rest
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist)
     (make_term firststackp ::: v)) = l

        (t : term σ a), 
        length t ≤ length l) v)
  × vecoplist2oplist

        apply concatenate_oplistsplit.
  Defined.

  (** ** Constructors and destuctors. *)

  (** [build_term] builds a term starting from principal operation symbol and subterms, while
  [princop] and [subterms] are the corresponding destructors. *)

  Local Definition oplist_build (nm: names σ) (v: vec (oplist σ) (length (arity nm)))
    : oplist σ := cons nm (vecoplist2oplist v).

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
isaterm (sort nm)
  (oplist_build nm
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
isaterm (sort nm)
  (oplist_build nm
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
oplistexec
  (nm
   :: vecoplist2oplist
        (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)) =
just [sort nm]

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
opexec nm
  (oplistexec
     (vecoplist2oplist
        (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))) =
just [sort nm]

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
opexec nm (just (length (arity nm),, arity nm)) =
just [sort nm]

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
opexec nm (just (length (arity nm),, arity nm)) =
just [sort nm]

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
rest: list (sorts σ)
p1: opexec nm (just (arity nm)) =
just (sort nm :: rest)
p2: prefix_remove (arity nm) (arity nm) = just rest
opexec nm (just (length (arity nm),, arity nm)) =
just [sort nm]

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
rest: list (sorts σ)
p1: opexec nm (just (arity nm)) =
just (sort nm :: rest)
p2: just [] = just rest
opexec nm (just (length (arity nm),, arity nm)) =
just [sort nm]

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
rest: list (sorts σ)
p1: opexec nm (just (arity nm)) =
just (sort nm :: rest)
p2: [] = rest
opexec nm (just (length (arity nm),, arity nm)) =
just [sort nm]

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
p1: opexec nm (just (arity nm)) = just [sort nm]
opexec nm (just (length (arity nm),, arity nm)) =
just [sort nm]

    assumption.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
term σ (sort nm)

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
term σ (sort nm)

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
isaterm (sort nm)
  (oplist_build nm
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))

    apply oplist_build_isaterm.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
∑ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)),
hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ)
      (t' : (λ H : sorts σ, term σ H) a),
      length t' < length t) v)
× sort nm = s
  × oplist_build nm
      (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) = t

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
∑ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)),
hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ)
      (t' : (λ H : sorts σ, term σ H) a),
      length t' < length t) v)
× sort nm = s
  × oplist_build nm
      (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) = t

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
l: oplist σ
lstack: isaterm s l
∑ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)),
hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
      length t' < length (l,, lstack)) v)
× sort nm = s
  × oplist_build nm
      (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) =
    l,, lstack

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
l: oplist σ
lstack: isaterm s l
∑ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)),
hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
      length (pr1 t') < length l) v)
× sort nm = s
  × oplist_build nm
      (h1map_vec
         (λ (a : sorts σ)
          (t : ∑ t : oplist σ, isaterm a t), pr1 t) v) =
    l

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
∏ l : oplist σ,
isaterm s l
→ ∑ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)),
  hvec
    (h1map_vec
       (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
        length (pr1 t') < length l) v)
  × sort nm = s
    × oplist_build nm
        (h1map_vec
           (λ (a : sorts σ)
            (t : ∑ t : oplist σ, isaterm a t), pr1 t)
           v) = l

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
isaterm s []
→ ∑ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)),
  hvec
    (h1map_vec
       (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
        length (pr1 t') < length []) v)
  × sort nm = s
    × oplist_build nm
        (h1map_vec
           (λ (a : sorts σ)
            (t : ∑ t : oplist σ, isaterm a t), pr1 t)
           v) = []
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
∏ (x : names σ) (xs : list (names σ)),
(isaterm s xs
 → ∑ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)),
   hvec
     (h1map_vec
        (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
         length (pr1 t') < length xs) v)
   × sort nm = s
     × oplist_build nm
         (h1map_vec
            (λ (a : sorts σ)
             (t : ∑ t : oplist σ, isaterm a t), pr1 t)
            v) = xs)
→ isaterm s (x :: xs)
  → ∑ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)),
    hvec
      (h1map_vec
         (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
          length (pr1 t') < length (x :: xs)) v)
    × sort nm = s
      × oplist_build nm
          (h1map_vec
             (λ (a : sorts σ)
              (t : ∑ t : oplist σ, isaterm a t), pr1 t)
             v) = x :: xs

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
isaterm s []
→ ∑ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)),
  hvec
    (h1map_vec
       (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
        length (pr1 t') < length []) v)
  × sort nm = s
    × oplist_build nm
        (h1map_vec
           (λ (a : sorts σ)
            (t : ∑ t : oplist σ, isaterm a t), pr1 t)
           v) = []
 
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
lstack: isaterm s []
∑ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)),
hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
      length (pr1 t') < length []) v)
× sort nm = s
  × oplist_build nm
      (h1map_vec
         (λ (a : sorts σ)
          (t : ∑ t : oplist σ, isaterm a t), pr1 t) v) =
    []

      
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
lstack: [] = [s]
∑ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)),
hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
      length (pr1 t') < length []) v)
× sort nm = s
  × oplist_build nm
      (h1map_vec
         (λ (a : sorts σ)
          (t : ∑ t : oplist σ, isaterm a t), pr1 t) v) =
    []
