:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) vtail)

        apply idpath.
  Defined.

  Definition princop {s: sorts σ} (t: term σ s): names σ
    := pr1 (term_decompose t).

  Definition subterms {s: sorts σ} (t: term σ s): (term σ)⋆ (arity (princop t))
    := pr12 (term_decompose t).

  Local Definition subterms_length {s: sorts σ} (t: term σ s)
    : hvec (h1map_vec (λ _ t', hProptoType (length (term2oplist t') < length t)) (subterms t))
    := pr122 (term_decompose t).

  Local Definition princop_sorteq {s: sorts σ} (t: term σ s): sort (princop t) = s
    := pr122 (pr2 (term_decompose t)).

  Local Definition oplist_normalization {s: sorts σ} (t: term σ s)
     : term2oplist (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)) = t
     := pr222 (pr2 (term_decompose t)).

  (** *** Term normalization *)
  (**
    We prove that [princop (build_term nm v) = nm], [subterms (build_term nm v) = v] and
    [build_term (princop t) (subterms t))] is equal to [t] modulo [transport].
  *)

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
princop_sorteq (build_term nm v) = idpath (sort nm)

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
princop_sorteq (build_term nm v) = idpath (sort nm)

     
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
isaprop (sort (princop (build_term nm v)) = sort nm)

     
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
isdeceq (sorts σ)

     apply decproperty.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
transportf (term σ) (princop_sorteq t)
  (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)) = t

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
transportf (term σ) (princop_sorteq t)
  (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)) = t

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
transportf (term σ) (pr122 (pr2 (term_decompose t)))
  (build_term (pr1 (term_decompose t))
     (pr12 (term_decompose t))) = t

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
vlen: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
      length t' < length t) v)
nmsort: sort nm = s
normalization: oplist_build nm
  (h1map_vec
     (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) =
t
transportf (term σ)
  (pr122 (pr2 (nm,, v,, vlen,, nmsort,, normalization)))
  (build_term
     (pr1 (nm,, v,, vlen,, nmsort,, normalization))
     (pr12 (nm,, v,, vlen,, nmsort,, normalization))) =
t

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
t: term σ (sort nm)
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
vlen: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
      length t' < length t) v)
normalization: oplist_build nm
  (h1map_vec
     (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) =
t
transportf (term σ)
  (pr122 (pr2
            (nm,,
             v,,
             vlen,, idpath (sort nm),, normalization)))
  (build_term
     (pr1
        (nm,,
         v,, vlen,, idpath (sort nm),, normalization))
     (pr12 (nm,,
            v,,
            vlen,, idpath (sort nm),, normalization))) =
t

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
t: term σ (sort nm)
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
vlen: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
      length t' < length t) v)
normalization: oplist_build nm
  (h1map_vec
     (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) =
t
build_term nm v = t

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
t: term σ (sort nm)
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
vlen: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
      length t' < length t) v)
normalization: oplist_build nm
  (h1map_vec
     (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) =
t
oplist_build nm
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) = pr1 t
σ: signature
nm: names σ
t: term σ (sort nm)
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
vlen: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
      length t' < length t) v)
normalization: oplist_build nm
  (h1map_vec
     (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) =
t
isaprop (isaterm (sort nm) (pr1 t))

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
t: term σ (sort nm)
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
vlen: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
      length t' < length t) v)
normalization: oplist_build nm
  (h1map_vec
     (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) =
t
oplist_build nm
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) = pr1 t
 apply normalization.
    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
t: term σ (sort nm)
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
vlen: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (t' : term σ a),
      length t' < length t) v)
normalization: oplist_build nm
  (h1map_vec
     (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v) =
t
isaprop (isaterm (sort nm) (pr1 t))
 apply isapropisaterm.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
princop (build_term nm v) = nm

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
princop (build_term nm v) = nm

    apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
subterms (build_term nm v) = v

  
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
subterms (build_term nm v) = v

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
tnorm:= term_normalization (build_term nm v): transportf (term σ)
  (princop_sorteq (build_term nm v))
  (build_term (princop (build_term nm v))
     (subterms (build_term nm v))) =
build_term nm v
subterms (build_term nm v) = v

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
tnorm: transportf (term σ) (idpath (sort nm))
  (build_term (princop (build_term nm v))
     (subterms (build_term nm v))) =
build_term nm v
subterms (build_term nm v) = v

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
tnorm: pr1
  (transportf (term σ) (idpath (sort nm))
     (build_term (princop (build_term nm v))
        (subterms (build_term nm v)))) =
pr1 (build_term nm v)
subterms (build_term nm v) = v

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
tnorm: oplist_build (princop (build_term nm v))
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist)
     (subterms (build_term nm v))) =
oplist_build nm
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)
subterms (build_term nm v) = v

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
tnorm: vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist)
     (subterms (build_term nm v))) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)
subterms (build_term nm v) = v

    
σ: signature
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
tnorm: subterms (build_term nm v) = v
subterms (build_term nm v) = v

    apply tnorm.
  Defined.

  (** *** Miscellanea properties for terms. *)

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
length t > 0

  
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
length t > 0

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
l: oplist σ
stackl: isaterm s l
length (l,, stackl) > 0

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
l: oplist σ
stackl: isaterm s l
x: names σ
xs: oplist σ
lstruct: l = x :: xs
length (l,, stackl) > 0

    
σ: signature
s: sorts σ
x: names σ
xs: oplist σ
lstruct: x :: xs = x :: xs
stackl: isaterm s (x :: xs)
length ((x :: xs),, stackl) > 0

    apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
X: UU
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
length t ≤ 0 → X

  
σ: signature
X: UU
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
length t ≤ 0 → X

    
σ: signature
X: UU
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ 0
X

    
σ: signature
X: UU
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: ¬ (length t > 0)
X

    contradicts tlen (length_term t).
  Defined.

End Term.

(** ** Term induction. *)

(**
If [P] is a map from terms to properties, then [term_ind_HP P] is the inductive hypothesis for terms:
given an operation symbol [nm], a sequence of terms of type specified by the arity of [nm], a proof of
the property [P] for eache of the terms in [v], we need a proof of [P] for the term built from [nm] and [v].
*)

Section TermInduction.

  Context {σ: signature}.

  Definition term_ind_HP (P: ∏ (s: sorts σ), term σ s → UU) :=
    ∏ (nm: names σ)
      (v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm))
      (IH: hvec (h1map_vec P v))
    , P (sort nm) (build_term nm v).

  (**
  The proof of the induction principle [term_ind] for terms proceeds by induction on the lenght of
  the oplist forming the terms in [term_ind_onlength].
  *)

  
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
∏ (n : nat) (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
length t ≤ n → P s t

  
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
∏ (n : nat) (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
length t ≤ n → P s t

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ 0 → P s t
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ S n → P s t

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ 0 → P s t
 
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ 0
P s t

      exact (term_notnil tlen).
    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ S n → P s t
 
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
P s t

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
P s
  (transportf (term σ) (princop_sorteq t)
     (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
P (sort (princop t))
  (transportf (term σ) (idpath (sort (princop t)))
     (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
P (sort (princop t))
  (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
hvec (h1map_vec P (subterms t))

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
∏ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a),
length p < length t → P a p

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
a: sorts σ
p: term σ a
X: length p < length t
P a p

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
a: sorts σ
p: term σ a
X: length p < length t
length p ≤ n

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
a: sorts σ
p: term σ a
X: length p < length t
length p < S n

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
a: sorts σ
p: term σ a
X: length p < length t
length p < ?m
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
a: sorts σ
p: term σ a
X: length p < length t
?m ≤ S n

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
a: sorts σ
p: term σ a
X: length p < length t
length p < ?m
 exact X.
      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s), length t ≤ n → P s t
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
tlen: length t ≤ S n
a: sorts σ
p: term σ a
X: length p < length t
length t ≤ S n
 exact tlen.
  Defined.

(*
  I would like to prove something like the following:

  Lemma term_ind_onlength_step (P: ∏ (s: sorts σ), term σ s → UU) (R: term_ind_HP P) (nm: names σ) (v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm))
    : ∏ (n: nat) (tlehn:  length (build_term nm v) ≤ n),
        term_ind_onlength P R n _ _ tlehn
        =  R nm v (transportf (λ x, hvec (hmap_vec P x))
                              (subterms_build_term nm v)
                              (hhmap (subterms_length (build_term nm v)) (λ s t p, term_ind_onlength P R n s t (istransnatleh (natlthtoleh _ _ p) tlehn)))).
*)

  
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
P s t

  
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
P s t

    exact (term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t (isreflnatleh _)).
  Defined.

  (** *** Term induction step *)

  (** In order to use term_induction, we need to prove an unfolding property. For example, for natural
  number induction the unfolding property is [nat_rect P a IH (S n) = IH n (nat_rect P a IH n)], in our
  case is given by [term_ind_step].
  *)

  
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
∏ n m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
  → ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
    (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1) (lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
    term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2

  
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
∏ n m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
  → ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
    (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1) (lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
    term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ 0
→ m2 ≤ 0
  → ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
    (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1) (lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
    term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ S n
→ m2 ≤ S n
  → ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
    (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1) (lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
    term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ 0
→ m2 ≤ 0
  → ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
    (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1) (lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
    term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
 
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: m1 ≤ 0
m2lehn: m2 ≤ 0
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ m1
lenm2: length t ≤ m2
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2

      exact (term_notnil (istransnatleh lenm1 m1lehn)).
    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ S n
→ m2 ≤ S n
  → ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
    (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1) (lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
    term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
 
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ m1
lenm2: length t ≤ m2
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m2: nat
m1lehn: 0 ≤ S n
m2lehn: m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ 0
lenm2: length t ≤ m2
term_ind_onlength P R 0 s t lenm1 =
term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
  → ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
    (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
    (lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
    term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m2: nat
m1lehn: 0 ≤ S n
m2lehn: m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ 0
lenm2: length t ≤ m2
term_ind_onlength P R 0 s t lenm1 =
term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
 exact (term_notnil lenm1).
      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
 
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: 0 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ 0
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R 0 s t lenm2
term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
term_ind_onlength P R 0 s t lenm2
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
  → ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
    (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
    (lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
    term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2

        
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: 0 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ 0
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R 0 s t lenm2
term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
term_ind_onlength P R 0 s t lenm2
 exact (term_notnil lenm2).
        
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
 
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
      P a
        (transportf (term σ) p0
           (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
     (R (princop t) (subterms t)
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
            term_ind_onlength P R m1 a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p) m1
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S m1) H lenm1)))
           (subterms_length t))) s (princop_sorteq t)) =
transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
      P a
        (transportf (term σ) p0
           (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
     (R (princop t) (subterms t)
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
            term_ind_onlength P R m2 a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p) m2
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S m2) H lenm2)))
           (subterms_length t))) s (princop_sorteq t))

          
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
  (R (princop t) (subterms t)
     (h2map
        (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
         (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
         term_ind_onlength P R m1 a p
           (natlthsntoleh (length p) m1
              (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                 (S m1) H lenm1))) (subterms_length t)))
  s (princop_sorteq t) =
paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
  (R (princop t) (subterms t)
     (h2map
        (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
         (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
         term_ind_onlength P R m2 a p
           (natlthsntoleh (length p) m2
              (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                 (S m2) H lenm2))) (subterms_length t)))
  s (princop_sorteq t)

          
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
f:= paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))): (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
 P a
   (transportf (term σ) p0
      (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
  (sort (princop t)) (idpath (sort (princop t)))
→ ∏ (a0 : sorts σ) (p : sort (princop t) = a0),
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))) a0
    p
f
  (R (princop t) (subterms t)
     (h2map
        (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
         (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
         term_ind_onlength P R m1 a p
           (natlthsntoleh (length p) m1
              (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                 (S m1) H lenm1))) (subterms_length t)))
  s (princop_sorteq t) =
f
  (R (princop t) (subterms t)
     (h2map
        (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
         (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
         term_ind_onlength P R m2 a p
           (natlthsntoleh (length p) m2
              (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                 (S m2) H lenm2))) (subterms_length t)))
  s (princop_sorteq t)

          
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
f:= paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))): (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
 P a
   (transportf (term σ) p0
      (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
  (sort (princop t)) (idpath (sort (princop t)))
→ ∏ (a0 : sorts σ) (p : sort (princop t) = a0),
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))) a0
    p
R (princop t) (subterms t)
  (h2map
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
      (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
      term_ind_onlength P R m1 a p
        (natlthsntoleh (length p) m1
           (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
              (S m1) H lenm1))) (subterms_length t)) =
R (princop t) (subterms t)
  (h2map
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
      (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
      term_ind_onlength P R m2 a p
        (natlthsntoleh (length p) m2
           (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
              (S m2) H lenm2))) (subterms_length t))

          
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
f:= paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))): (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
 P a
   (transportf (term σ) p0
      (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
  (sort (princop t)) (idpath (sort (princop t)))
→ ∏ (a0 : sorts σ) (p : sort (princop t) = a0),
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))) a0
    p
h2map
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
   (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
   term_ind_onlength P R m1 a p
     (natlthsntoleh (length p) m1
        (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t) (S m1) H
           lenm1))) (subterms_length t) =
h2map
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
   (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
   term_ind_onlength P R m2 a p
     (natlthsntoleh (length p) m2
        (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t) (S m2) H
           lenm2))) (subterms_length t)

          
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
f:= paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))): (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
 P a
   (transportf (term σ) p0
      (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
  (sort (princop t)) (idpath (sort (princop t)))
→ ∏ (a0 : sorts σ) (p : sort (princop t) = a0),
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))) a0
    p
(λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
 (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
 term_ind_onlength P R m1 a p
   (natlthsntoleh (length p) m1
      (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t) (S m1) H
         lenm1))) =
(λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
 (H : natgtb (length t) (length p) = true),
 term_ind_onlength P R m2 a p
   (natlthsntoleh (length p) m2
      (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t) (S m2) H
         lenm2)))

          
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
f:= paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))): (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
 P a
   (transportf (term σ) p0
      (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
  (sort (princop t)) (idpath (sort (princop t)))
→ ∏ (a0 : sorts σ) (p : sort (princop t) = a0),
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))) a0
    p
x: sorts σ
x0: term σ x
x1: natgtb (length t) (length x0) = true
term_ind_onlength P R m1 x x0
  (natlthsntoleh (length x0) m1
     (natlthlehtrans (length x0) (length t) (S m1) x1
        lenm1)) =
term_ind_onlength P R m2 x x0
  (natlthsntoleh (length x0) m2
     (natlthlehtrans (length x0) (length t) (S m2) x1
        lenm2))

          
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
f:= paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))): (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
 P a
   (transportf (term σ) p0
      (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
  (sort (princop t)) (idpath (sort (princop t)))
→ ∏ (a0 : sorts σ) (p : sort (princop t) = a0),
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))) a0
    p
x: sorts σ
x0: term σ x
x1: natgtb (length t) (length x0) = true
m1 ≤ n
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
  → ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
    (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
    (lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
    term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
f:= paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))): (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
 P a
   (transportf (term σ) p0
      (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
  (sort (princop t)) (idpath (sort (princop t)))
→ ∏ (a0 : sorts σ) (p : sort (princop t) = a0),
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))) a0
    p
x: sorts σ
x0: term σ x
x1: natgtb (length t) (length x0) = true
m2 ≤ n

          
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2

m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n

lenm2: length t ≤ S m2

  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2

  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))): (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
 P a
   (transportf (term σ) p0
      (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
  (sort (princop t)) (idpath (sort (princop t)))
→ ∏ (a0 : sorts σ) (p : sort (princop t) = a0),
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))) a0

σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m1 m2 : nat,
m1 ≤ n
→ m2 ≤ n
→ ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s) (lenm1 : length t ≤ m1)
(lenm2 : length t ≤ m2),
term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 = term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
m1, m2: nat
m1lehn: S m1 ≤ S n
m2lehn: S m2 ≤ S n
s: sorts σ
t: term σ s
lenm1: length t ≤ S m1
lenm2: length t ≤ S m2
IHm1: m1 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
  term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
  term_ind_onlength P R (S m2) s t lenm2
IHm2: m2 ≤ S n
→ ∏ lenm2 : length t ≤ m2,
  (m1 ≤ S n
   → ∏ lenm1 : length t ≤ m1,
     term_ind_onlength P R m1 s t lenm1 =
     term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2)
  → term_ind_onlength P R (S m1) s t lenm1 =
    term_ind_onlength P R m2 s t lenm2
f:= paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))): (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
 P a
   (transportf (term σ) p0
      (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
  (sort (princop t)) (idpath (sort (princop t)))
→ ∏ (a0 : sorts σ) (p : sort (princop t) = a0),
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
   P a
     (transportf (term σ) p0
        (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)))) a0
