x0: term σ x
x1: natgtb (length t) (length x0) = true
m2 ≤ n
 apply m2lehn.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
P: nat → UU
a: P 0
IH: ∏ n : nat, P n → P (S n)
n: nat
nat_rect P a IH (S n) = IH n (nat_rect P a IH n)

  
σ: signature
P: nat → UU
a: P 0
IH: ∏ n : nat, P n → P (S n)
n: nat
nat_rect P a IH (S n) = IH n (nat_rect P a IH n)
 apply idpath. Defined.

  
σ: signature
A: UU
a: A
P: ∏ a0 : A, a = a0 → UU
x: P a (idpath a)
paths_rect A a P x a (idpath a) = x

  
σ: signature
A: UU
a: A
P: ∏ a0 : A, a = a0 → UU
x: P a (idpath a)
paths_rect A a P x a (idpath a) = x
 apply idpath. Defined.

  
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
term_ind P R (build_term nm v) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ)
      (t : (λ s0 : sorts σ, term σ s0) s)
      (_ : (λ (a : sorts σ) (_ : term σ a), term σ a)
             s t), term_ind P R t) (h1lift v))

  
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
term_ind P R (build_term nm v) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ)
      (t : (λ s0 : sorts σ, term σ s0) s)
      (_ : (λ (a : sorts σ) (_ : term σ a), term σ a)
             s t), term_ind P R t) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
term_ind_onlength P R (length (build_term nm v))
  (sort nm) (build_term nm v)
  (isreflnatleh (length (build_term nm v))) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
term_ind_onlength P R (length (build_term nm v))
  (sort nm) (build_term nm v)
  (isreflnatleh (length (build_term nm v))) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq t =
idpath (sort nm)
term_ind_onlength P R (length t) (sort nm) t
  (isreflnatleh (length t)) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq t =
idpath (sort nm)
term_ind_onlength P R
  (S
     (pr1
        (vecoplist2oplist
           (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))))
  (sort nm) t
  (isreflnatleh
     (S
        (pr1
           (vecoplist2oplist
              (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                 v))))) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq t =
idpath (sort nm)
nat_rect
  (λ n : nat,
   ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
   length t ≤ n → P s t)
  (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
   (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
  (λ (n : nat)
   (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
          length t ≤ n → P s t) (s : sorts σ)
   (t : term σ s) (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
   transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
     (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
        (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
         P a
           (transportf (term σ) p0
              (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
        (R (princop t) (subterms t)
           (h2map
              (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
               (H : length p < length t),
               IHn a p
                 (natlthsntoleh (length p) n
                    (natlthlehtrans (length p)
                       (length t) (S n) H tlen)))
              (subterms_length t))) s
        (princop_sorteq t)))
  (S
     (pr1
        (vecoplist2oplist
           (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))))
  (sort nm) t
  (isreflnatleh
     (S
        (pr1
           (vecoplist2oplist
              (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                 v))))) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq t =
idpath (sort nm)
transportf (P (sort nm)) (term_normalization t)
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
      P a
        (transportf (term σ) p0
           (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
     (R (princop t) (subterms t)
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : length p < length t),
            nat_rect
              (λ n : nat,
               ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
               length t ≤ n → P s t)
              (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
              (λ (n : nat)
               (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                      length t ≤ n → P s t)
               (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
               transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
                 (paths_rect (sorts σ)
                    (sort (princop t))
                    (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                     (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                     P a0
                       (transportf (term σ) p0
                          (build_term (princop t)
                             (subterms t))))
                    (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                       (h2map
                          (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                           (p0 : term σ a0)
                           (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                           IHn a0 p0
                             (natlthsntoleh
                                (length p0) n
                                (natlthlehtrans ...
                                   ... ... H0 tlen)))
                          (subterms_length t))) s
                    (princop_sorteq t)))
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
              a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p)
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S
                       (pr1
                          (vecoplist2oplist
                             (h1map_vec
                                (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                                 term2oplist) v)))) H
                    (isreflnatleh
                       (S
                          (pr1
                             (vecoplist2oplist
                                (h1map_vec
                                   (λ ..., term2oplist)
                                   v))))))))
           (subterms_length t))) (sort nm)
     (princop_sorteq t)) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq t =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len:= subterms_length t: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ)
      (t' : (λ H : sorts σ, term σ H) a),
      length t' < length t) 
     (subterms t))
transportf (P (sort nm)) (term_normalization t)
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
      P a
        (transportf (term σ) p0
           (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
     (R (princop t) (subterms t)
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : length p < length t),
            nat_rect
              (λ n : nat,
               ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
               length t ≤ n → P s t)
              (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
              (λ (n : nat)
               (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                      length t ≤ n → P s t)
               (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
               transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
                 (paths_rect (sorts σ)
                    (sort (princop t))
                    (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                     (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                     P a0
                       (transportf (term σ) p0
                          (build_term (princop t)
                             (subterms t))))
                    (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                       (h2map
                          (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                           (p0 : term σ a0)
                           (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                           IHn a0 p0
                             (natlthsntoleh
                                (length p0) n
                                (natlthlehtrans ...
                                   ... ... H0 tlen)))
                          (subterms_length t))) s
                    (princop_sorteq t)))
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
              a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p)
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S
                       (pr1
                          (vecoplist2oplist
                             (h1map_vec
                                (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                                 term2oplist) v)))) H
                    (isreflnatleh
                       (S
                          (pr1
                             (vecoplist2oplist
                                (h1map_vec
                                   (λ ..., term2oplist)
                                   v)))))))) v0len))
     (sort nm) (princop_sorteq t)) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq t =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len:= subterms_length t: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ)
      (t' : (λ H : sorts σ, term σ H) a),
      length t' < length t) 
     (subterms t))
v0norm:= term_normalization t: transportf (term σ) 
  (princop_sorteq t)
  (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)) = t
transportf (P (sort nm)) v0norm
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
      P a
        (transportf (term σ) p0
           (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
     (R (princop t) (subterms t)
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : length p < length t),
            nat_rect
              (λ n : nat,
               ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
               length t ≤ n → P s t)
              (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
              (λ (n : nat)
               (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                      length t ≤ n → P s t)
               (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
               transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
                 (paths_rect (sorts σ)
                    (sort (princop t))
                    (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                     (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                     P a0
                       (transportf (term σ) p0
                          (build_term (princop t)
                             (subterms t))))
                    (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                       (h2map
                          (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                           (p0 : term σ a0)
                           (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                           IHn a0 p0
                             (natlthsntoleh
                                (length p0) n
                                (natlthlehtrans ...
                                   ... ... H0 tlen)))
                          (subterms_length t))) s
                    (princop_sorteq t)))
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
              a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p)
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S
                       (pr1
                          (vecoplist2oplist
                             (h1map_vec
                                (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                                 term2oplist) v)))) H
                    (isreflnatleh
                       (S
                          (pr1
                             (vecoplist2oplist
                                (h1map_vec
                                   (λ ..., term2oplist)
                                   v)))))))) v0len))
     (sort nm) (princop_sorteq t)) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq t =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ)
      (t' : (λ H : sorts σ, term σ H) a),
      length t' < length t) 
     (subterms t))
v0norm: transportf (term σ) 
  (princop_sorteq t)
  (build_term (princop t) (subterms t)) = t
transportf (P (sort nm)) v0norm
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
      P a
        (transportf (term σ) p0
           (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
     (R (princop t) (subterms t)
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : length p < length t),
            nat_rect
              (λ n : nat,
               ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
               length t ≤ n → P s t)
              (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
              (λ (n : nat)
               (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                      length t ≤ n → P s t)
               (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
               transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
                 (paths_rect (sorts σ)
                    (sort (princop t))
                    (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                     (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                     P a0
                       (transportf (term σ) p0
                          (build_term (princop t)
                             (subterms t))))
                    (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                       (h2map
                          (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                           (p0 : term σ a0)
                           (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                           IHn a0 p0
                             (natlthsntoleh
                                (length p0) n
                                (natlthlehtrans ...
                                   ... ... H0 tlen)))
                          (subterms_length t))) s
                    (princop_sorteq t)))
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
              a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p)
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S
                       (pr1
                          (vecoplist2oplist
                             (h1map_vec
                                (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                                 term2oplist) v)))) H
                    (isreflnatleh
                       (S
                          (pr1
                             (vecoplist2oplist
                                (h1map_vec
                                   (λ ..., term2oplist)
                                   v)))))))) v0len))
     (sort nm) (princop_sorteq t)) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq t =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ)
      (t' : (λ H : sorts σ, term σ H) a),
      length t' < length t) 
     (subterms t))
v0norm: transportf (term σ) 
  (princop_sorteq t)
  (build_term nm (subterms t)) = t
transportf (P (sort nm)) v0norm
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort nm)
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort nm = a),
      P a
        (transportf (term σ) p0
           (build_term nm (subterms t))))
     (R nm (subterms t)
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : length p < length t),
            nat_rect
              (λ n : nat,
               ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
               length t ≤ n → P s t)
              (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
              (λ (n : nat)
               (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                      length t ≤ n → P s t)
               (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
               transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
                 (paths_rect (sorts σ)
                    (sort (princop t))
                    (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                     (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                     P a0
                       (transportf (term σ) p0
                          (build_term (princop t)
                             (subterms t))))
                    (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                       (h2map
                          (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                           (p0 : term σ a0)
                           (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                           IHn a0 p0
                             (natlthsntoleh
                                (length p0) n
                                (natlthlehtrans ...
                                   ... ... H0 tlen)))
                          (subterms_length t))) s
                    (princop_sorteq t)))
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
              a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p)
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S
                       (pr1
                          (vecoplist2oplist
                             (h1map_vec
                                (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                                 term2oplist) v)))) H
                    (isreflnatleh
                       (S
                          (pr1
                             (vecoplist2oplist
                                (h1map_vec
                                   (λ ..., term2oplist)
                                   v)))))))) v0len))
     (sort nm) (princop_sorteq t)) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq t =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0norm: transportf (term σ) 
  (princop_sorteq t) 
  (build_term nm v) = t
transportf (P (sort nm)) v0norm
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort nm)
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort nm = a),
      P a (transportf (term σ) p0 (build_term nm v)))
     (R nm v
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : length p < length t),
            nat_rect
              (λ n : nat,
               ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
               length t ≤ n → P s t)
              (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
              (λ (n : nat)
               (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                      length t ≤ n → P s t)
               (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
               transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
                 (paths_rect (sorts σ)
                    (sort (princop t))
                    (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                     (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                     P a0
                       (transportf (term σ) p0
                          (build_term (princop t)
                             (subterms t))))
                    (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                       (h2map
                          (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                           (p0 : term σ a0)
                           (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                           IHn a0 p0
                             (natlthsntoleh
                                (length p0) n
                                (natlthlehtrans ...
                                   ... ... H0 tlen)))
                          (subterms_length t))) s
                    (princop_sorteq t)))
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
              a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p)
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S
                       (pr1
                          (vecoplist2oplist
                             (h1map_vec
                                (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                                 term2oplist) v)))) H
                    (isreflnatleh
                       (S
                          (pr1
                             (vecoplist2oplist
                                (h1map_vec
                                   (λ ..., term2oplist)
                                   v)))))))) v0len))
     (sort nm) (princop_sorteq t)) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0norm: transportf (term σ) 
  (idpath (sort nm)) 
  (build_term nm v) = t
transportf (P (sort nm)) v0norm
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort nm)
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort nm = a),
      P a (transportf (term σ) p0 (build_term nm v)))
     (R nm v
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : length p < length t),
            nat_rect
              (λ n : nat,
               ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
               length t ≤ n → P s t)
              (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
              (λ (n : nat)
               (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                      length t ≤ n → P s t)
               (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
               transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
                 (paths_rect (sorts σ)
                    (sort (princop t))
                    (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                     (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                     P a0
                       (transportf (term σ) p0
                          (build_term (princop t)
                             (subterms t))))
                    (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                       (h2map
                          (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                           (p0 : term σ a0)
                           (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                           IHn a0 p0
                             (natlthsntoleh
                                (length p0) n
                                (natlthlehtrans ...
                                   ... ... H0 tlen)))
                          (subterms_length t))) s
                    (princop_sorteq t)))
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
              a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p)
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S
                       (pr1
                          (vecoplist2oplist
                             (h1map_vec
                                (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                                 term2oplist) v)))) H
                    (isreflnatleh
                       (S
                          (pr1
                             (vecoplist2oplist
                                (h1map_vec
                                   (λ ..., term2oplist)
                                   v)))))))) v0len))
     (sort nm) (idpath (sort nm))) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0norm: build_term nm v = t
transportf (P (sort nm)) v0norm
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort nm)
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort nm = a),
      P a (transportf (term σ) p0 (build_term nm v)))
     (R nm v
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : length p < length t),
            nat_rect
              (λ n : nat,
               ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
               length t ≤ n → P s t)
              (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
              (λ (n : nat)
               (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                      length t ≤ n → P s t)
               (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
               transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
                 (paths_rect (sorts σ)
                    (sort (princop t))
                    (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                     (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                     P a0
                       (transportf (term σ) p0
                          (build_term (princop t)
                             (subterms t))))
                    (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                       (h2map
                          (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                           (p0 : term σ a0)
                           (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                           IHn a0 p0
                             (natlthsntoleh
                                (length p0) n
                                (natlthlehtrans ...
                                   ... ... H0 tlen)))
                          (subterms_length t))) s
                    (princop_sorteq t)))
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
              a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p)
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S
                       (pr1
                          (vecoplist2oplist
                             (h1map_vec
                                (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                                 term2oplist) v)))) H
                    (isreflnatleh
                       (S
                          (pr1
                             (vecoplist2oplist
                                (h1map_vec
                                   (λ ..., term2oplist)
                                   v)))))))) v0len))
     (sort nm) (idpath (sort nm))) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0norm: build_term nm v = t
v0norm = idpath (build_term nm v)
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0norm: build_term nm v = t
v0normisid: v0norm = idpath (build_term nm v)
transportf (P (sort nm)) v0norm
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) 
     (sort nm)
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (p0 : sort nm = a),
      P a (transportf (term σ) p0 (build_term nm v)))
     (R nm v
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) 
            (p : term σ a) 
            (H : length p < length t),
            nat_rect
              (λ 
               n : nat,
               ∏ 
               (s : sorts σ) 
               (t : term σ s), 
               length t ≤ n → P s t)
              (λ 
               (s : sorts σ) 
               (t : term σ s) 
               (tlen : length t ≤ 0), 
               term_notnil tlen)
              (λ 
               (n : nat)
               (IHn : 
                ∏ 
                (s : sorts σ) 
                (t : term σ s), 
                length t ≤ n → P s t) 
               (s : sorts σ) 
               (t : term σ s) 
               (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
               transportf 
                (P s) 
                (term_normalization t)
                (paths_rect 
                (sorts σ) 
                (sort (princop t))
                (λ 
                (a0 : sorts σ)
                (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                P a0
                (transportf 
                (term σ) p0
                (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
                (R (princop t) 
                (subterms t)
                (h2map
                (λ 
                (a0 : sorts σ) 
                (p0 : term σ a0)
                (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                IHn a0 p0
                (natlthsntoleh 
                (length p0) n
                (natlthlehtrans ... ... ... H0 tlen)))
                (subterms_length t))) s
                (princop_sorteq t)))
              (pr1
                (vecoplist2oplist
                (h1map_vec
                (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))) a p
              (natlthsntoleh 
                (length p)
                (pr1
                (vecoplist2oplist
                (h1map_vec
                (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
                (natlthlehtrans 
                (length p) 
                (length t)
                (S
                (pr1
                (vecoplist2oplist
                (h1map_vec
                (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))) H
                (isreflnatleh
                (S
                (pr1
                (vecoplist2oplist
                (h1map_vec (λ ..., term2oplist) v))))))))
           v0len)) 
     (sort nm) (idpath (sort nm))) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) 
      (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R 
        (length t) s t 
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) 
     (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0norm: build_term nm v = t
v0norm = idpath (build_term nm v)

      
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0norm: build_term nm v = t
isaprop (build_term nm v = t)

      apply isasetterm.
    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0norm: build_term nm v = t
v0normisid: v0norm = idpath (build_term nm v)
transportf (P (sort nm)) v0norm
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort nm)
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort nm = a),
      P a (transportf (term σ) p0 (build_term nm v)))
     (R nm v
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : length p < length t),
            nat_rect
              (λ n : nat,
               ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
               length t ≤ n → P s t)
              (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
              (λ (n : nat)
               (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                      length t ≤ n → P s t)
               (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
               transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
                 (paths_rect (sorts σ)
                    (sort (princop t))
                    (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                     (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                     P a0
                       (transportf (term σ) p0
                          (build_term (princop t)
                             (subterms t))))
                    (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                       (h2map
                          (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                           (p0 : term σ a0)
                           (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                           IHn a0 p0
                             (natlthsntoleh
                                (length p0) n
                                (natlthlehtrans ...
                                   ... ... H0 tlen)))
                          (subterms_length t))) s
                    (princop_sorteq t)))
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
              a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p)
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S
                       (pr1
                          (vecoplist2oplist
                             (h1map_vec
                                (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                                 term2oplist) v)))) H
                    (isreflnatleh
                       (S
                          (pr1
                             (vecoplist2oplist
                                (h1map_vec
                                   (λ ..., term2oplist)
                                   v)))))))) v0len))
     (sort nm) (idpath (sort nm))) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
transportf (P (sort nm)) (idpath (build_term nm v))
  (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort nm)
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort nm = a),
      P a (transportf (term σ) p0 (build_term nm v)))
     (R nm v
        (h2map
           (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
            (H : length p < length t),
            nat_rect
              (λ n : nat,
               ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
               length t ≤ n → P s t)
              (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
              (λ (n : nat)
               (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                      length t ≤ n → P s t)
               (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
               (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
               transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
                 (paths_rect (sorts σ)
                    (sort (princop t))
                    (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                     (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                     P a0
                       (transportf (term σ) p0
                          (build_term (princop t)
                             (subterms t))))
                    (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                       (h2map
                          (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                           (p0 : term σ a0)
                           (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                           IHn a0 p0
                             (natlthsntoleh
                                (length p0) n
                                (natlthlehtrans ...
                                   ... ... H0 tlen)))
                          (subterms_length t))) s
                    (princop_sorteq t)))
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
              a p
              (natlthsntoleh (length p)
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))
                 (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                    (S
                       (pr1
                          (vecoplist2oplist
                             (h1map_vec
                                (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                                 term2oplist) v)))) H
                    (isreflnatleh
                       (S
                          (pr1
                             (vecoplist2oplist
                                (h1map_vec
                                   (λ ..., term2oplist)
                                   v)))))))) v0len))
     (sort nm) (idpath (sort nm))) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort nm)
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort nm = a),
   P a (transportf (term σ) p0 (build_term nm v)))
  (R nm v
     (h2map
        (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
         (H : length p < length t),
         nat_rect
           (λ n : nat,
            ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
            length t ≤ n → P s t)
           (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
            (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
           (λ (n : nat)
            (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                   length t ≤ n → P s t) (s : sorts σ)
            (t : term σ s) (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
            transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
              (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
                 (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                  (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
                  P a0
                    (transportf (term σ) p0
                       (build_term (princop t)
                          (subterms t))))
                 (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                    (h2map
                       (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
                        (p0 : term σ a0)
                        (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                        IHn a0 p0
                          (natlthsntoleh (length p0) n
                             (natlthlehtrans
                                (length p0) (length t)
                                (S n) H0 tlen)))
                       (subterms_length t))) s
                 (princop_sorteq t)))
           (pr1
              (vecoplist2oplist
                 (h1map_vec
                    (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
           a p
           (natlthsntoleh (length p)
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
              (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
                 (S
                    (pr1
                       (vecoplist2oplist
                          (h1map_vec
                             (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                              term2oplist) v)))) H
                 (isreflnatleh
                    (S
                       (pr1
                          (vecoplist2oplist
                             (h1map_vec
                                (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                                 term2oplist) v))))))))
        v0len)) (sort nm) (idpath (sort nm)) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
      (H : length p < length t),
      nat_rect
        (λ n : nat,
         ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
         length t ≤ n → P s t)
        (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
         (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
        (λ (n : nat)
         (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
                length t ≤ n → P s t) (s : sorts σ)
         (t : term σ s) (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
         transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
           (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
              (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
               (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
               P a0
                 (transportf (term σ) p0
                    (build_term (princop t)
                       (subterms t))))
              (R (princop t) (subterms t)
                 (h2map
                    (λ (a0 : sorts σ) (p0 : term σ a0)
                     (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                     IHn a0 p0
                       (natlthsntoleh (length p0) n
                          (natlthlehtrans (length p0)
                             (length t) (S n) H0 tlen)))
                    (subterms_length t))) s
              (princop_sorteq t)))
        (pr1
           (vecoplist2oplist
              (h1map_vec (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                 v))) a p
        (natlthsntoleh (length p)
           (pr1
              (vecoplist2oplist
                 (h1map_vec
                    (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
           (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
              (S
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))) H
              (isreflnatleh
                 (S
                    (pr1
                       (vecoplist2oplist
                          (h1map_vec
                             (λ a0 : sorts σ,
                              term2oplist) v))))))))
     v0len) =
R nm v
  (h2map
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
      term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
        (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
h2map
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
   (H : length p < length t),
   nat_rect
     (λ n : nat,
      ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
      length t ≤ n → P s t)
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
      (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
     (λ (n : nat)
      (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
             length t ≤ n → P s t) (s : sorts σ)
      (t : term σ s) (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
      transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
        (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
           (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
            (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
            P a0
              (transportf (term σ) p0
                 (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
           (R (princop t) (subterms t)
              (h2map
                 (λ (a0 : sorts σ) (p0 : term σ a0)
                  (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                  IHn a0 p0
                    (natlthsntoleh (length p0) n
                       (natlthlehtrans (length p0)
                          (length t) (S n) H0 tlen)))
                 (subterms_length t))) s
           (princop_sorteq t)))
     (pr1
        (vecoplist2oplist
           (h1map_vec (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
     a p
     (natlthsntoleh (length p)
        (pr1
           (vecoplist2oplist
              (h1map_vec (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                 v)))
        (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
           (S
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))))
           H
           (isreflnatleh
              (S
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))))))) v0len =
h2map
  (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
   term_ind_onlength P R (length t) s t
     (isreflnatleh (length t))) (h1lift v)

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
h2map
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
   (H : length p < length t),
   nat_rect
     (λ n : nat,
      ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
      length t ≤ n → P s t)
     (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
      (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
     (λ (n : nat)
      (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
             length t ≤ n → P s t) (s : sorts σ)
      (t : term σ s) (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
      transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
        (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
           (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
            (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
            P a0
              (transportf (term σ) p0
                 (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
           (R (princop t) (subterms t)
              (h2map
                 (λ (a0 : sorts σ) (p0 : term σ a0)
                  (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                  IHn a0 p0
                    (natlthsntoleh (length p0) n
                       (natlthlehtrans (length p0)
                          (length t) (S n) H0 tlen)))
                 (subterms_length t))) s
           (princop_sorteq t)))
     (pr1
        (vecoplist2oplist
           (h1map_vec (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
     a p
     (natlthsntoleh (length p)
        (pr1
           (vecoplist2oplist
              (h1map_vec (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                 v)))
        (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
           (S
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))))
           H
           (isreflnatleh
              (S
                 (pr1
                    (vecoplist2oplist
                       (h1map_vec
                          (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                          v)))))))) v0len =
h2map
  (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
   (_ : length p < length t),
   term_ind_onlength P R (length p) a p
     (isreflnatleh (length p))) v0len

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
(λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
 (H : length p < length t),
 nat_rect
   (λ n : nat,
    ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
    length t ≤ n → P s t)
   (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
    (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
   (λ (n : nat)
    (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
           length t ≤ n → P s t) (s : sorts σ)
    (t : term σ s) (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
    transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
      (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
         (λ (a0 : sorts σ)
          (p0 : sort (princop t) = a0),
          P a0
            (transportf (term σ) p0
               (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
         (R (princop t) (subterms t)
            (h2map
               (λ (a0 : sorts σ) (p0 : term σ a0)
                (H0 : length p0 < length t),
                IHn a0 p0
                  (natlthsntoleh (length p0) n
                     (natlthlehtrans (length p0)
                        (length t) (S n) H0 tlen)))
               (subterms_length t))) s
         (princop_sorteq t)))
   (pr1
      (vecoplist2oplist
         (h1map_vec (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
   a p
   (natlthsntoleh (length p)
      (pr1
         (vecoplist2oplist
            (h1map_vec (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
      (natlthlehtrans (length p) (length t)
         (S
            (pr1
               (vecoplist2oplist
                  (h1map_vec
                     (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))))
         H
         (isreflnatleh
            (S
               (pr1
                  (vecoplist2oplist
                     (h1map_vec
                        (λ a0 : sorts σ, term2oplist)
                        v)))))))) =
(λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
 (_ : length p < length t),
 term_ind_onlength P R (length p) a p
   (isreflnatleh (length p)))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
x: sorts σ
x0: term σ x
x1: length x0 < length t
nat_rect
  (λ n : nat,
   ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
   length t ≤ n → P s t)
  (λ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s)
   (tlen : length t ≤ 0), term_notnil tlen)
  (λ (n : nat)
   (IHn : ∏ (s : sorts σ) (t : term σ s),
          length t ≤ n → P s t) (s : sorts σ)
   (t : term σ s) (tlen : length t ≤ S n),
   transportf (P s) (term_normalization t)
     (paths_rect (sorts σ) (sort (princop t))
        (λ (a : sorts σ) (p0 : sort (princop t) = a),
         P a
           (transportf (term σ) p0
              (build_term (princop t) (subterms t))))
        (R (princop t) (subterms t)
           (h2map
              (λ (a : sorts σ) (p : term σ a)
               (H : length p < length t),
               IHn a p
                 (natlthsntoleh (length p) n
                    (natlthlehtrans (length p)
                       (length t) (S n) H tlen)))
              (subterms_length t))) s
        (princop_sorteq t)))
  (pr1
     (vecoplist2oplist
        (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))) x
  x0
  (natlthsntoleh (length x0)
     (pr1
        (vecoplist2oplist
           (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))
     (natlthlehtrans (length x0) (length t)
        (S
           (pr1
              (vecoplist2oplist
                 (h1map_vec
                    (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))))
        x1
        (isreflnatleh
           (S
              (pr1
                 (vecoplist2oplist
                    (h1map_vec
                       (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))))))) =
term_ind_onlength P R (length x0) x x0
  (isreflnatleh (length x0))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
x: sorts σ
x0: term σ x
x1: length x0 < length t
pr1
  (vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))
≤ pr1
    (vecoplist2oplist
       (h1map_vec (λ x2 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)

  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)

     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
x: sorts σ
x0: term σ x
x1: length x0 < length t
length x0
≤ pr1
    (vecoplist2oplist
       (h1map_vec (λ x2 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))

    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)

  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)

  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
x: sorts σ
x0: term σ x
x1: length x0 < length t
pr1
  (vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))
≤ pr1
    (vecoplist2oplist
       (h1map_vec (λ x2 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))
 apply isreflnatleh.
    
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
x: sorts σ
x0: term σ x
x1: length x0 < length t
length x0
≤ pr1
    (vecoplist2oplist
       (h1map_vec (λ x2 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v))
 
σ: signature
P: ∏ s : sorts σ, term σ s → UU
R: term_ind_HP P
nm: names σ
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
t:= build_term nm v: term σ (sort nm)
princop_sorteq_idpath:= princop_sorteq_buildterm nm v: princop_sorteq
  (build_term nm v) =
idpath (sort nm)
v0len: hvec
  (h1map_vec
     (λ (a : sorts σ) 
      (t' : term σ a), 
      length t' < length t) v)
v0normisid: idpath (build_term nm v) =
idpath (build_term nm v)
x: sorts σ
x0: term σ x
x1: length x0 < length t
length x0 <
S
  (pr1
     (vecoplist2oplist
        (h1map_vec (λ x2 : sorts σ, term2oplist) v)))

      apply x1.
  Defined.

  (** *** Immediate applications of term induction *)

  (**
  [depth] returns the depth of a term, while [fromterm] is the evaluation map from terms
  to an algebra. Finally, [fromtermstep] is the unfolding property for [fromterm].
  *)

  Definition depth {s: sorts σ}: term σ s → nat
    := term_ind (λ _ _, nat)
                (λ (nm: names σ) (v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)) (depths: hvec (h1map_vec (λ _ _, nat) v)),
                   1 + h2foldr (λ _ _, max) 0 depths).

  Local Definition fromterm {A: sUU (sorts σ)} (op : ∏ (nm : names σ), A⋆ (arity nm) → A (sort nm)) {s: sorts σ}
    : term σ s → A s
    := term_ind (λ s _, A s) (λ nm v rec, op nm (h2lower rec)).

  
σ: signature
A: sUU (sorts σ)
nm: names σ
op: ∏ nm : names σ, A⋆ (arity nm) → A (sort nm)
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
fromterm op (build_term nm v) =
op nm (h1map (@fromterm A op) v)

  
σ: signature
A: sUU (sorts σ)
nm: names σ
op: ∏ nm : names σ, A⋆ (arity nm) → A (sort nm)
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
fromterm op (build_term nm v) =
op nm (h1map (@fromterm A op) v)

    
σ: signature
A: sUU (sorts σ)
nm: names σ
op: ∏ nm : names σ, A⋆ (arity nm) → A (sort nm)
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
term_ind (λ (s : sorts σ) (_ : term σ s), A s)
  (λ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm))
   (rec : hvec
            (h1map_vec
               (λ (s : sorts σ) (_ : term σ s), A s) v)),
   op nm (h2lower rec)) (build_term nm v) =
op nm
  (h1map
     (λ s : sorts σ,
      term_ind
        (λ (s0 : sorts σ) (_ : term σ s0), A s0)
        (λ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm))
         (rec : hvec
                  (h1map_vec
                     (λ (s0 : sorts σ)
                      (_ : term σ s0), A s0) v)),
         op nm (h2lower rec))) v)

    
σ: signature
A: sUU (sorts σ)
nm: names σ
op: ∏ nm : names σ, A⋆ (arity nm) → A (sort nm)
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
op nm
  (h2lower
     (h2map
        (λ (s : sorts σ) (t _ : term σ s),
         term_ind
           (λ (s0 : sorts σ) (_ : term σ s0), A s0)
           (λ (nm : names σ)
            (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm))
            (rec : hvec
                     (h1map_vec
                        (λ (s0 : sorts σ)
                         (_ : term σ s0), A s0) v)),
            op nm (h2lower rec)) t) (h1lift v))) =
op nm
  (h1map
     (λ s : sorts σ,
      term_ind
        (λ (s0 : sorts σ) (_ : term σ s0), A s0)
        (λ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm))
         (rec : hvec
                  (h1map_vec
                     (λ (s0 : sorts σ)
                      (_ : term σ s0), A s0) v)),
         op nm (h2lower rec))) v)

    
σ: signature
A: sUU (sorts σ)
nm: names σ
op: ∏ nm : names σ, A⋆ (arity nm) → A (sort nm)
v: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm)
op nm
  (h1map
     (@term_ind (λ (s : sorts σ) (_ : term σ s), A s)
        (λ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm))
         (rec : hvec
                  (h1map_vec
                     (λ (s : sorts σ) (_ : term σ s),
                      A s) v)), op nm (h2lower rec)))
     v) =
op nm
  (h1map
     (λ s : sorts σ,
      term_ind
        (λ (s0 : sorts σ) (_ : term σ s0), A s0)
        (λ (nm : names σ) (v : (term σ)⋆ (arity nm))
         (rec : hvec
                  (h1map_vec
                     (λ (s0 : sorts σ)
                      (_ : term σ s0), A s0) v)),
         op nm (h2lower rec))) v)

    apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
transportf (term σ) p (build_term nm1 v1) =
build_term nm2 v2
→ ∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
  transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op))
    eqnm v1 = v2

  
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
transportf (term σ) p (build_term nm1 v1) =
build_term nm2 v2
→ ∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
  transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op))
    eqnm v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
X: transportf (term σ) p (build_term nm1 v1) =
build_term nm2 v2
∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op)) eqnm
  v1 = v2

    (* The following three lines are in the place of a rewrite *)
    
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
X: transportf (term σ) p (build_term nm1 v1) =
build_term nm2 v2
Y:= transportf_total2_const (sorts σ) (oplist σ)
  (λ (t : oplist σ) (s : sorts σ), isaterm s t)
  (oplist_build nm1
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1))
  (sort nm1) (sort nm2) p
  (oplist_build_isaterm nm1 v1): transportf
  (λ x : sorts σ,
   ∑ y : oplist σ,
   (λ (t : oplist σ) (s : sorts σ), isaterm s t) y
     x) p
  (oplist_build nm1
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1),,
   oplist_build_isaterm nm1 v1) =
oplist_build nm1
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1),,
transportf
  ((λ (t : oplist σ) (s : sorts σ), isaterm s t)
     (oplist_build nm1
        (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1)))
  p (oplist_build_isaterm nm1 v1)
∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op)) eqnm
  v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
X: oplist_build nm1
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1),,
transportf
  (λ s : sorts σ,
   isaterm s
     (oplist_build nm1
        (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1)))
  p (oplist_build_isaterm nm1 v1) =
build_term nm2 v2
Y:= transportf_total2_const (sorts σ) (oplist σ)
  (λ (t : oplist σ) (s : sorts σ), isaterm s t)
  (oplist_build nm1
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1))
  (sort nm1) (sort nm2) p
  (oplist_build_isaterm nm1 v1): transportf
  (λ x : sorts σ,
   ∑ y : oplist σ,
   (λ (t : oplist σ) (s : sorts σ), isaterm s t) y
     x) p
  (oplist_build nm1
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1),,
   oplist_build_isaterm nm1 v1) =
oplist_build nm1
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1),,
transportf
  ((λ (t : oplist σ) (s : sorts σ), isaterm s t)
     (oplist_build nm1
        (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1)))
  p (oplist_build_isaterm nm1 v1)
∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op)) eqnm
  v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
X: oplist_build nm1
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1),,
transportf
  (λ s : sorts σ,
   isaterm s
     (oplist_build nm1
        (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1)))
  p (oplist_build_isaterm nm1 v1) =
build_term nm2 v2
∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op)) eqnm
  v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
X: oplist_build nm1
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1),,
transportf
  (λ s : sorts σ,
   isaterm s
     (oplist_build nm1
        (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1)))
  p (oplist_build_isaterm nm1 v1) =
oplist_build nm2
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2),,
oplist_build_isaterm nm2 v2
∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op)) eqnm
  v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
X: (nm1
 :: vecoplist2oplist
      (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1)),,
transportf
  (λ s : sorts σ,
   isaterm s
     (nm1
      :: vecoplist2oplist
           (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist)
              v1))) p
  (oplist_build_isaterm nm1 v1) =
(nm2
 :: vecoplist2oplist
      (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)),,
oplist_build_isaterm nm2 v2
∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op)) eqnm
  v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
X: pr1
  ((nm1
    :: vecoplist2oplist
         (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist)
            v1)),,
   transportf
     (λ s : sorts σ,
      isaterm s
        (nm1
         :: vecoplist2oplist
              (h1map_vec
                 (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1)))
     p (oplist_build_isaterm nm1 v1)) =
pr1
  ((nm2
    :: vecoplist2oplist
         (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist)
            v2)),, oplist_build_isaterm nm2 v2)
∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op)) eqnm
  v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
X: nm1
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
nm2
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op)) eqnm
  v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
X: nm1
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
nm2
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
eqnm:= X: nm1
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
nm2
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op)) eqnm
  v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
X: nm1
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
nm2
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
eqnm: nm1 = nm2
∑ eqnm : nm1 = nm2,
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op)) eqnm
  v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1, nm2: names σ
v1: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm2)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm2
X: nm1
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
nm2
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
eqnm: nm1 = nm2
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op)) eqnm
  v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1: names σ
v1, v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm1
X: nm1
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
nm1
:: vecoplist2oplist
     (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op))
  (idpath nm1) v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1: names σ
v1, v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm1
X: vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v1) =
vecoplist2oplist
  (h1map_vec (λ a : sorts σ, term2oplist) v2)
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op))
  (idpath nm1) v1 = v2

    
σ: signature
nm1: names σ
v1, v2: (term σ)⋆ (arity nm1)
p: sort nm1 = sort nm1
X: v1 = v2
transportf (λ op : names σ, (term σ)⋆ (arity op))
  (idpath nm1) v1 = v2

    exact X.
  Defined.

End TermInduction.

(** ** Notations for ground terms. *)
(**
Since [term], [termset], [fromterm] and [fromtermstep]  will be redefined in
[UniMath.Algebra.Universal.VTerms] in their more general form with variables, we introduce
here notations [gterm], [make_gterm] and similar to make the ground version publically
available with special names.
*)

Notation gterm := term.

Notation gtermset := termset.

Notation fromgterm := fromterm.

Notation fromgtermstep := fromtermstep.

Notation build_gterm := build_term.

(** *** Helpers for working with curried functions. *)

Definition build_gterm' {σ: signature} (nm: names σ)
  : iterfun (vec_map (term σ) (arity nm)) (term σ (sort nm))
  := currify (build_term nm).
